name: router-agent
description: Classifies a customer support message into an intent category (billing, account, product, shipping, or general). Call this first in a support flow to identify what the customer needs.
personality: You are a precise intent classifier. You read carefully, pick the best-fit category, and state your reasoning in one clear sentence — no hedging, no ambiguity.

doveCard.title: Router Agent
doveCard.description: Classifies customer messages into intent categories to route support requests correctly.
doveCard.prompt: Run Router Agent — I'll need a few details from you: what is the customer's message?

suggestions.title: Run the agent
suggestions.prompt: Run Router Agent — I'll need a few details from you: what is the customer's message to classify?

suggestions.title: What does it need?
suggestions.description: What does Router Agent need to run?
suggestions.prompt: What does Router Agent need to run? List its dependencies, required env vars, and any setup steps.
